case_title: ROSENBERG, DEBBIE VS BROWN, STEVEN A. DBA BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT. et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION FILED BY DEFT, P.K. SAHI, FOR ADDRESS CHANGE.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,150.00 FILED BY ROSENBERG, DEBBIE AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, STEVEN A. DBA BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT. SAHI, PARVESH K. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-2001 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT SAHI, PARVESH K.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, STEVEN A. DBA BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO SAHI, PARVESH K. RETURNED, MOVED LEFT NO ADDRESS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROSENBERG, DEBBIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAHI, PARVESH K. $450.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00, STEVEN BROWN IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF TO RETAIN CHECK FOR $758.09 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT SAHI, PARVESH K.
